[80:40]using the budget reconciliation progress.

[80:43]This is a provision that came into effect in the 1970s.

[80:47]It says a bill that increases revenue, decreases spending,

[80:51]or affects the debt ceiling.

[81:23]that's why they call it reconciliation

[81:25]because they reconcile between the two chambers.

[88:47]has banned transgender surgery for minors.

[89:04]that we got Supreme Court justices on the bench

[89:08]to repeal Roe versus Wade.

[89:12]that will undoubtedly save children,

[89:14]save their lives from being irreparably,

[89:18]irreversibly ruined by these surgeries.

[89:25]every day will save a multitude of lives.

[89:30]if people said I'm voting Republican for that reason,
